Order Your Custom Telescoping Banner Stand Today

The Telescoping Banner Stand offers superior flexibility with its adjustable telescoping pole that extends from 62.5" up to 79" high, making it perfect for trade show displays, retail environments, and professional presentations. This premium retractable banner stand system works exceptionally well for displays that remain in place for extended periods.

Our telescoping banner stand features a snap rail header and precision roller system that allows you to interchange custom printed banners with ease. Each banner is professionally printed at maximum height to ensure optimal visual impact and brand presentation.

The durable construction and portable design make these banner stands ideal for businesses requiring flexible, professional display solutions that can adapt to various venue requirements and display heights.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Telescoping Banner Stand Material Options for Indoor & Outdoor Displays

Each telescoping banner stand includes premium retractor hardware and a professionally printed 79" x 31" banner. Choose from our selection of durable materials optimized for banner stand applications:

13 oz Vinyl Banner Material: Our most versatile banner material, engineered for both indoor and outdoor banner stand displays. Provides excellent durability and print quality for extended use.

14 oz No Curl Vinyl Banner Material: Premium quality prints with a smooth matte finish that resists curling and maintains professional appearance in banner stand applications.

Banner Soft Fabric Material: Lightweight fabric option with matte finish and vibrant color reproduction, ideal for indoor trade show and retail displays.

Note: Exact banner sizes cannot be guaranteed due to vinyl's temperature-sensitive properties. Heat application during printing and finishing, plus climate variations, may cause slight size fluctuations. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot.

Custom sizing and specialty material applications are available upon request for specific banner stand requirements.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Finishing & Hardware Specifications

Your telescoping banner stand includes professional finishing options designed for durability and ease of use:

Telescoping Pole System: Adjustable height mechanism allows display flexibility from 62.5" to 79" to accommodate various venue requirements and ceiling heights.

Snap Rail Header: Precision-engineered snap rail system ensures secure banner attachment and easy banner changes for ongoing campaigns.

Roller Mechanism: Smooth retraction system protects your custom printed banner during transport and storage while ensuring professional deployment.

Portable Base Design: Stable base construction provides secure standing support while remaining lightweight for easy transport between trade shows and display locations.

Banner Attachment System: Professional finishing includes top and bottom rail attachments designed specifically for telescoping banner stand hardware compatibility.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production scheduling to meet your trade show and display deadlines. Choose from multiple turnaround options for your telescoping banner stand:

2 Business Days Express Production: Expedited service for urgent trade show and event deadlines. Ideal when you need your banner stand display quickly but have an extra day for planning.

3 Business Days Standard Production: Our most popular turnaround option, providing the perfect balance of speed and value for most banner stand projects. This option is complimentary with your order.

5 Business Days Saver Production: Cost-effective option when your timeline allows for extended production. Perfect for advance trade show planning and budget-conscious projects.

Production begins once artwork files are approved. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available - contact customer service for availability.

Turnaround time includes banner printing and hardware assembly but excludes shipping transit time to your location.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Telescoping Banner Stand Payment & Ordering Options

All custom banner stands require payment approval before entering production to ensure quality control and timely delivery.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover credit cards
  • Business checks (must be received and cleared before production begins)
  • Purchase orders from established accounts

Payment Processing: Your credit card will only be charged after you have reviewed and approved your banner stand order details, including artwork, materials, and specifications.

Order Approval Process: You maintain complete control over your banner stand order through our approval system, ensuring accuracy before production begins.

For check payments, delivery timing will include check processing time plus production and shipping schedules. Contact customer service for specific timing with check payments.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Telescoping Banner Stand Delivery

Available Shipping Methods:

  • Economy Shipping (5-10 Business Days)
  • Standard Shipping (3-5 Business Days)
  • Three Day Service (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day Express (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight Delivery (1 Business Day)

Shipping Guidelines for Banner Stands: Telescoping banner stand hardware requires careful packaging due to size and weight. Shipping costs are calculated based on package dimensions, weight, and destination.

Order Tracking: You will receive tracking information once your banner stand ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress for trade show and event planning.

Delivery Protection: After shipment, all carrier terms and conditions apply. Damaged goods must be returned for replacement processing. Lost packages will be replaced after carrier confirms loss (typically 7-10 business days).

International Shipping: Available for telescoping banner stands with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently accepting USPS and UPS international labels only.

Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for specific shipping guidance for your banner stand delivery requirements.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Display Applications for Telescoping Banner Stands

Trade Show Applications: Perfect for booth displays, product launches, and professional presentations where adjustable height capability provides venue flexibility.

Retail Display Uses: Ideal for storefront promotions, seasonal campaigns, and in-store marketing where displays need to remain in place for extended periods.

Corporate Events: Excellent for conference displays, meeting presentations, and corporate announcements requiring professional, portable banner solutions.

Educational Institutions: Suitable for campus events, graduation ceremonies, and informational displays where easy transport and setup are essential.

Healthcare Facilities: Appropriate for patient information displays, health fairs, and facility announcements requiring clean, professional presentation.

Hospitality Industry: Perfect for hotel event displays, restaurant promotions, and venue marketing where frequent banner changes are needed.

Real Estate Applications: Effective for open house displays, property marketing, and office promotions requiring professional presentation standards.

The telescoping adjustment feature makes these banner stands particularly valuable for businesses operating in multiple venues with varying space requirements.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Telescoping Banner Stand Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Preferred File Formats: Vector-based files (.eps with fonts converted to outlines) produce the highest quality results for banner stand printing. We also accept high-resolution .pdf, .tiff, or .jpg files.

Resolution Requirements: For optimal print quality on banner stand materials, provide artwork at 300 DPI or higher resolution. This ensures crisp text and clear graphics at the 79" x 31" banner size.

File Size Limitations: Upload files up to 60 MB through our online system. For larger files, contact customer service for alternative transfer methods to ensure fastest processing.

Design Specifications: Banner dimensions are optimized for the telescoping banner stand hardware. Our design team can assist with sizing and layout optimization for best display results.

Order Proof Options: Request an order proof to review artwork, order details, pricing, and shipping information before production begins. Production will not start until you provide approval.

Color Matching: For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System provides the most accurate color representation for your banner stand graphics.

Professional Design Services: Our in-house graphic design team can create custom artwork for your telescoping banner stand, ensuring professional results optimized for your display needs.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Customize & Order Your Telescoping Banner Stand Display

Ready to create your professional telescoping banner stand display? Our user-friendly ordering system makes it simple to customize your banner stand with your artwork, select materials, and choose production timing that meets your trade show or display deadlines.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Banner Stand Needs:

Expert Customer Service: Our 100% in-house customer service team consists of professional graphic designers ready to assist with your banner stand specifications and artwork requirements.

Flexible Production Scheduling: Choose from 1, 2, 3, or 5-day production options to complete your telescoping banner stand on your timeline, whether for urgent trade shows or planned campaigns.

Premium Materials & Printing: Your banner stand is manufactured using the finest materials and printed with the latest wide-format printing technology for professional results.

Live Order Tracking: Monitor your banner stand production progress every step of the way with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system, ensuring you know exactly when to expect delivery.

Start customizing your telescoping banner stand today and experience the difference professional-grade display hardware makes for your marketing and promotional needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Telescoping Banner Stands

How tall can the telescoping banner stand extend?
The telescoping pole adjusts from 62.5" up to 79" high, providing flexibility for various venue ceiling heights and display requirements.

Can I change banners on the telescoping stand?
Yes, the snap rail header and roller system are designed for easy banner interchanging, making it perfect for ongoing campaigns and seasonal updates.

What banner size is included with the telescoping stand?
Each unit includes one professionally printed 79" x 31" banner. The banner is printed at maximum height for optimal visual impact.

Is the telescoping banner stand suitable for outdoor use?
The banner materials (13 oz vinyl and 14 oz no-curl vinyl) are rated for both indoor and outdoor applications. However, the telescoping stand hardware is designed primarily for indoor or covered outdoor use.

How portable is the telescoping banner stand?
The stand is designed for portability with a lightweight base construction, making it easy to transport between trade shows, events, and display locations.

What if my artwork doesn't fit the 79" x 31" dimensions?
Our graphic design team can help resize and optimize your artwork for the telescoping banner stand dimensions while maintaining visual quality and design integrity.

Can I order multiple banners for one telescoping stand?
Yes, you can order additional banners separately to use with your telescoping stand hardware for different campaigns or seasonal promotions.

What's included with my telescoping banner stand order?
Your order includes the complete telescoping banner stand hardware (adjustable pole, base, snap rail header, roller mechanism) plus one custom printed 79" x 31" banner.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
